title: chlorophytum calyptrocarpum
intro: Chlorophytum calyptrocarpum, also known as the yellow bush iris, is a type of flowering plant native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chlorophytum calyptrocarpum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
